items.name: Red Pelta and Akontia
items.description:
Wield the legendary Pelta and Akontia, the iconic equipment of the Thracian skirmisher. This crescent-shaped shield is masterfully crafted from a lightweight wicker frame and finished with a durable leather covering for maximum mobility in the heat of battle. It features the iconic apotropaic eyes in yellow over a red background.All paired with a set of iron-tipped Akontia javelins, this set represents the pinnacle of ancient hit-and-run tactics.

Matching Items: https://www.roblox.com/communities/35750427/Velvoria-Devworks
